Author: bdg
Name: Hunt Tally
Punchline: How many S and A ranks you still need for each hunt achievement, per expansion.
Description: Reads the game's hunt achievement list, fetches your live progress from the server (the same request the achievement window makes) and shows it grouped by expansion: every S-rank and A-rank kill-count achievement with a progress bar and how many kills remain, plus the big overall elite-mark totals. Progress is cached per character so the window opens instantly; refresh on demand. Open with /hunttally.
